data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizing the number of choices to help users make decisions faster.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation menus and content categorization to reduce decision time.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designing UI components proportional to their usage to facilitate interaction.
data.technical_spec: Larger click areas for more frequently used buttons like Play and Pause.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Leveraging visual perception principles to enhance content grouping and hierarchy.
data.technical_spec: Clear visual separations between different shows and sections.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Blending aesthetics and usability to improve satisfaction and engagement.
data.technical_spec: High-quality visuals and animations, combined with button feedback.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligning designs with user expectations based on experiences from other platforms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent interface patterns with other popular streaming services.
